pattern: Two pointers walking inward from both ends swap characters in place, reversing the array with no extra allocation.
hints: Reversing means the first character ends up last and vice versa, so pair up symmetric positions.
Use one index at the start and one at the end, swapping their characters and stepping them toward the middle.
While left < right, swap s[left] and s[right], then increment left and decrement right until they meet.

edge_inputs.description: odd length leaves a fixed middle character
non-letter printable characters reverse the same way

stress.description: long array of random printable ascii characters
